examples: Stewart expected him to remonstrate, and was surprised at his acceptance of defeat.
I don't remonstrate, I simply answer you.
Who would want to remonstrate and argue with them?
Ferguson marched on to the field immediately after the match to remonstrate with the official.
He gestured for the Barca boss to sit back down after Rijkaard sprung to the touchline to remonstrate to Collina about a challenge on Andres Iniesta.
